TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-home_buya_imuy
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: maken tangi haw tananpaimi anu temawaR si.
S.PHON: makən taŋi haw tananpaimi anu təmawaʁ si.
S.FORM: maken tangi haw tananpaimi anu temawaR si.
S.PHON: makən taŋi haw tananpaimi anu təmawaʁ si.

S.FORM: yau a lanasniq qangid tanan sa kalinku anu temawaR zinku nani.
S.PHON: jau a ranasniq qaŋiɮ tanan sa karinku anu təmawaʁ z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: yau a lanasniq qangid tanan sa kalinku anu temawaR zinku nani.
S.PHON: jau a ranasniq qaŋiɮ tanan sa karinku anu təmawaʁ z~rinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天有事情,想要回去花蓮.

TRANSL.notes: We have things (to do) tomorrow and want to go back to Hualian.

S.TRANSL: We have things tomorrow and want to go back to Hualian.

S.FORM: mai qawtu anu temawaR anu iza u anu qawtuan pasazi tazian.
S.PHON: mai qawtu anu təmawaʁ anu iz~ra u anu qawtuan pasaz~ri taz~rian.
S.FORM: mai qawtu anu temawaR anu iza u anu qawtuan pasazi tazian.
S.PHON: mai qawtu anu təmawaʁ anu iz~ra u anu qawtuan pasaz~ri taz~rian.
S.TRANSL: 下次可能沒時間來這裡.
I probably won't have time to come here next time.

TRANSL.notes: Maybe (I) won't be able to come.

S.TRANSL: Maybe won't be able to come.

S.FORM: si qumni wanay yauti 'nay nani tongzhi na na singsi si awkaimi mawtu uman zinku.
S.PHON: si qumni wanaj jauti ʔnaj nani t*ŋz~rhi na na siŋsi si awkaimi mawtu uman z~rinku.
S.FORM: si qumni wanay yauti 'nay nani tongzhi na na singsi si awkaimi mawtu uman zinku.
S.PHON: si qumni wanaj jauti ʔnaj nani t*ŋz~rhi na na siŋsi si awkaimi mawtu uman z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 不知道什麼時候老師通知我再回來.
I will come here sometime when the teacher notifies me.

S.FORM: nani anu yauti 'nay tongzhi na singsi si awkaimi mawtu uman pasazi tazian ta taidaan zinku ni sikawma.
S.PHON: nani anu jauti ʔnaj t*ŋz~rhi na siŋsi si awkaimi mawtu uman pasaz~ri taz~rian ta taiɮaan z~rinku ni sikawma.
S.FORM: nani anu yauti 'nay tongzhi na singsi si awkaimi mawtu uman pasazi tazian ta taidaan zinku ni sikawma.
S.PHON: nani anu jauti ʔnaj t*ŋz~rhi na siŋsi si awkaimi mawtu uman pasaz~ri taz~rian ta taiɮaan z~rinku ni sikawma.
S.TRANSL: We will come again to NTU if notified.

S.FORM: yaupama sa sinsanuan tu zana la na zinnaay atu zana lepaway zinku nani.
S.PHON: jaupama sa sinsanuan tu z~rana ra na z~rinnaaj atu z~rana rəpawaj z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: yaupama sa sinsanuan tu zana la na zinnaay atu zana lepaway zinku nani.
S.PHON: jaupama sa sinsanuan tu z~rana ra na z~rinnaaj atu z~rana rəpawaj z~rinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們還要談家裡的事情.
We still need to talk about some family matters.

S.FORM: uta aisu i aisu supaRay si.
S.PHON: uta aisu i aisu supaʁaj si.
S.FORM: uta aisu i aisu supaRay si.
S.PHON: uta aisu i aisu supaʁaj si.

S.TRANSL: 我想知道你的想法是什麼.
I want to know your opinion.
你們做弟妹的如果決定什麼事,
If you younger generation decides on anything,
我做大姐的沒有什麼意見.
As a sister, I don't have any opinion.

S.FORM: hm qawman kilimanta 'nay qenaswanita qalisimpu qawka miza tu hm lanasta.
S.PHON: hm qawman kirimanta ʔnaj qənaswanita qarisimpu qawka miz~ra tu hm ranasta.
S.FORM: hm qawman kilimanta 'nay qenaswanita qalisimpu qawka miza tu hm lanasta.
S.PHON: hm qawman kirimanta ʔnaj qənaswanita qarisimpu qawka miz~ra tu hm ranasta.
S.TRANSL: 我們當然要找我們的兄弟姊妹聚在一起,處理一些事情.
We certainly will gather our siblings and take care of some matters.

S.FORM: 'nay zena tazian nani pameng ma maiza.
S.PHON: ʔnaj z~rəna taz~rian nani paməŋ ma maiz~ra.
S.FORM: 'nay zena tazian nani pameng ma maiza.
S.PHON: ʔnaj z~rəna taz~rian nani paməŋ ma maiz~ra.
S.TRANSL: The paddy has become like this.

S.FORM: ma pun lanasna tu zana nialaanna lazan 'nay zinku nani.
S.PHON: ma pun ranasna tu z~rana niaraanna raz~ran ʔnaj z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: ma pun lanasna tu zana nialaanna lazan 'nay zinku nani.
S.PHON: ma pun ranasna tu z~rana niaraanna raz~ran ʔnaj z~rinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 關於那塊地呢,地被道路徵收的事情還沒解決.
About the land, that the land was levied is not settled yet.

S.FORM: hm m m pataz miza ti abu tayan tu mana maipama.
S.PHON: hm m m pataz~r miz~ra ti aβu tajan tu mana maipama.
S.FORM: hm m m pataz miza ti abu tayan tu mana maipama.
S.PHON: hm m m pataz~r miz~ra ti aβu tajan tu mana maipama.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽常常在問這件事為什麼還沒解決.
Mother often asks why the thing hasn't been solved yet.

S.FORM: mzukat saizaanna sab sabulaanna timaitaan tu kelisiw kelisiw 'nay zana izaay.
S.PHON: mz~rukat saiz~raanna saβ saβuraanna timaitaan tu kərisiw kərisiw ʔnaj z~rana iz~raaj.
S.FORM: mzukat saizaanna sab sabulaanna timaitaan tu kelisiw kelisiw 'nay zana izaay.
S.PHON: mz~rukat saiz~raanna saβ saβuraanna timaitaan tu kərisiw kərisiw ʔnaj z~rana iz~raaj.
S.TRANSL: Why isn't the money given to us yet?

W.TRANSL: 未來-做某事-名物化-3SG.屬格

TRANSL.notes: I also call (them) often.

S.FORM: yau sayzi niizaanna ni nipatuqesanna. XXXX
yau sayzi niizaanna ni nipatuqesanna. XXXX

W.TRANSL: 完成-做某事-名物化-3SG.屬格

S.FORM: ni sika ni palingwaanna na m iza.
S.PHON: ni sika ni pariŋwaanna na m iz~ra.
S.FORM: ni sika ni palingwaanna na m iza.
S.PHON: ni sika ni pariŋwaanna na m iz~ra.

S.FORM: lazan 'nay nialaanna lazan 'nay zena 'nay kwa nani.
S.PHON: raz~ran ʔnaj niaraanna raz~ran ʔnaj z~rəna ʔnaj kwa nani.
S.FORM: lazan 'nay nialaanna lazan 'nay zena 'nay kwa nani.
S.PHON: raz~ran ʔnaj niaraanna raz~ran ʔnaj z~rəna ʔnaj kwa nani.
S.TRANSL: 地被路徵收的那件事啊.
The thing about the road being levied.

S.FORM: anu mawtu 'nay sudad 'nay tangi zinna kya.
S.PHON: anu mawtu ʔnaj suɮaɮ ʔnaj taŋi z~rinna kja.
S.FORM: anu mawtu 'nay sudad 'nay tangi zinna kya.
S.PHON: anu mawtu ʔnaj suɮaɮ ʔnaj taŋi z~rinna kja.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽說今天公文會下來.
Mother said that the official document would be issued today.

S.FORM: a tihuangxiansheng 'nay m m patazika palingwa zinna ni abu.
S.PHON: a tihuaŋ*ianshəŋ ʔnaj m m pataz~rika pariŋwa z~rinna ni aβu.
S.FORM: a tihuangxiansheng 'nay m m patazika palingwa zinna ni abu.
S.PHON: a tihuaŋ*ianshəŋ ʔnaj m m pataz~rika pariŋwa z~rinna ni aβu.
S.TRANSL: 媽媽叫我要常常打電話過去.
Mother tells me to call them often.

S.FORM: nani mai salibayan qazusaanku palingwa nani.
S.PHON: nani mai sariβajan qaz~rusaanku pariŋwa nani.
S.FORM: nani mai salibayan qazusaanku palingwa nani.
S.PHON: nani mai sariβajan qaz~rusaanku pariŋwa nani.
S.TRANSL: 我一個禮拜打兩次電話.

S.FORM: ipili XXXX palanaiku palanaikati lingwaku zinna.
ipili XXXX palanaiku palanaikati lingwaku zinna.

TRANSL.notes: 你就停下來(辦一辦)?
You stop by (and take care of that)?

S.FORM: teqazan nengiti azu yau lawazta tmeqaz nengi ya.
S.PHON: təqaz~ran nəŋiti az~ru jau rawaz~rta tməqaz~r nəŋi ja.
S.FORM: teqazan nengiti azu yau lawazta tmeqaz nengi ya.
S.PHON: təqaz~ran nəŋiti az~ru jau rawaz~rta tməqaz~r nəŋi ja.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們有時間的話,可以啊.

S.FORM: wanay ka yau qumni aizipna talepawan zinta ya.
S.PHON: wanaj ka jau qumni aiz~ripna tarəpawan z~rinta ja.
S.FORM: wanay ka yau qumni aizipna talepawan zinta ya.
S.PHON: wanaj ka jau qumni aiz~ripna tarəpawan z~rinta ja.
S.TRANSL: 但是他在不在家我們也不知道.
But we don't know if he will be at home.

S.FORM: qunayka palingwa si kawka zinku ya.
S.PHON: qunajka pariŋwa si kawka z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: qunayka palingwa si kawka zinku ya.
S.PHON: qunajka pariŋwa si kawka z~rinku ja.

TRANSL.notes: (We) should call before we go.
He has many things (to do).
(He) often rushes about for…
(為了)那條路的事.

S.FORM: lazanay na atu iza ya tu pasasaniay.
S.PHON: raz~ranaj na atu iz~ra ja tu pasasaniaj.
S.FORM: lazanay na atu iza ya tu pasasaniay.
S.PHON: raz~ranaj na atu iz~ra ja tu pasasaniaj.

TRANSL.notes: (為了)路的事情和別的事情東跑西跑.

S.TRANSL: 路的事情和別的事情東跑西跑.

TRANSL.notes: (He) rushes about for things about the road and others.

S.TRANSL: rushes about for things about the road and others.

S.FORM: mai yu wama zataay qaya lanas ya lanasna si.
S.PHON: mai ju wama z~rataaj qaja ranas ja ranasna si.
S.FORM: mai yu wama zataay qaya lanas ya lanasna si.
S.PHON: mai ju wama z~rataaj qaja ranas ja ranasna si.
S.TRANSL: 他要忙的事情並不是只有我們的事.
He is busy not only with our things.

TRANSL.notes: We will go back (to Xinshe) tomorrow, then,

S.TRANSL: We will go back tomorrow, then,

S.FORM: yau lanas zau zana ni qa.
S.PHON: jau ranas z~rau z~rana ni qa.
S.FORM: yau lanas zau zana ni qa.
S.PHON: jau ranas z~rau z~rana ni qa.

TRANSL.notes: 有(過世的那個人的)事情(要忙).
There will be things about (the person who passed away).
(things) about Uncle Zunsing.

S.FORM: ni ku tuzani taneman timaizipana Ranaw.
S.PHON: ni ku tuz~rani tanəman timaiz~ripana ʁanaw.
S.FORM: ni ku tuzani taneman timaizipana Ranaw.
S.PHON: ni ku tuz~rani tanəman timaiz~ripana ʁanaw.

S.FORM: nizita tanan pasazi ta sinsyaan anu temawaR anu iza u.
S.PHON: niz~rita tanan pasaz~ri ta sinsjaan anu təmawaʁ anu iz~ra u.
S.FORM: nizita tanan pasazi ta sinsyaan anu temawaR anu iza u.
S.PHON: niz~rita tanan pasaz~ri ta sinsjaan anu təmawaʁ anu iz~ra u.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天全部要回去新社.
All of us will go back to Xinshe tomorrow.

S.FORM: sanhao u erhaoML2paiku tmanan zinku nani.
S.PHON: sanha* u ərha*mr*paiku tmanan z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: sanhao u erhaoML2paiku tmanan zinku nani.
S.PHON: sanha* u ərha*mr*paiku tmanan z~rinku nani.

S.FORM: awkaita simsanu mniz si awka nengi zinku ya.
S.PHON: awkaita simsanu mniz~r si awka nəŋi z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: awkaita simsanu mniz si awka nengi zinku ya.
S.PHON: awkaita simsanu mniz~r si awka nəŋi z~rinku ja.
S.TRANSL: 我們全部再一起談,我想這樣比較好.

TRANSL.notes: We can talk about (it) together. I think it would be better.

S.TRANSL: We can talk about together. I think it would be better.
I think I will go back later.
I will take the night train back.
You will go back at night?

S.FORM: tiazay qaya nani suRabipaimi zinna qaya smanu nani.
S.PHON: tiaz~raj qaja nani suʁaβipaimi z~rinna qaja smanu nani.
S.FORM: tiazay qaya nani suRabipaimi zinna qaya smanu nani.
S.PHON: tiaz~raj qaja nani suʁaβipaimi z~rinna qaja smanu nani.
S.TRANSL: 阿才說他們也要趁夜回去.
Azay said, "We will also go back at night."

TRANSL.notes: I don't know. (I am not sure.)

S.FORM: naquni kelawkawayan na qaniyau Raynguankupama qaya nani.
S.PHON: naquni kərawkawajan na qanijau ʁajŋuankupama qaja nani.
S.FORM: naquni kelawkawayan na qaniyau Raynguankupama qaya nani.
S.PHON: naquni kərawkawajan na qanijau ʁajŋuankupama qaja nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們的工作怎麼樣我還不清楚.
I don't know how their work is.

S.FORM: qawanayti sanhao Rabi si awkaiku tanan zinna nani.
S.PHON: qawanajti sanha* ʁaβi si awkaiku tanan z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: qawanayti sanhao Rabi si awkaiku tanan zinna nani.
S.PHON: qawanajti sanha* ʁaβi si awkaiku tanan z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說他只好三號晚上才可以回去.
He said, "I can go back only on the night of 3."

S.FORM: ita XXXX tanan u qumuni Raynguanku qaya.
S.PHON: ita **** tanan u qumuni ʁajŋuanku qaja.
S.FORM: ita XXXX tanan u qumuni Raynguanku qaya.
S.PHON: ita **** tanan u qumuni ʁajŋuanku qaja.
S.TRANSL: 回去或怎麼樣,我也不知道.
To go back or whatever. I don't know either.

S.FORM: niqeinu sanhaoti ma jueding zakuay sanhao tu tananan.
S.PHON: niqəinu sanha*ti ma juəɮiŋ z~rakuaj sanha* tu tananan.
S.FORM: niqeinu sanhaoti ma jueding zakuay sanhao tu tananan.
S.PHON: niqəinu sanha*ti ma juəɮiŋ z~rakuaj sanha* tu tananan.
S.TRANSL: 我決定三號一定要回去.

S.FORM: tu Rabi taRbabiti maseq tu lepaw ah zinku.
S.PHON: tu ʁaβi taʁβaβiti masəq tu rəpaw ah z~rinku.
S.FORM: tu Rabi taRbabiti maseq tu lepaw ah zinku.
S.PHON: tu ʁaβi taʁβaβiti masəq tu rəpaw ah z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 坐夜車,我想早上就到家了.

TRANSL.notes: Taking the night (train), I think I would arrive home in the morning.

S.TRANSL: Taking the night , I think I would arrive home in the morning.

TRANSL.notes: 剛好(出殯那天)回來,可以啦.
Coming back just (on the day of the funeral). It's ok.

S.FORM: m m m 'nay ni sanuan ni abu tu zana zanaay tu saazasanna 'nay iza ka dianfongshansu nani.
S.PHON: m m m ʔnaj ni sanuan ni aβu tu z~rana z~ranaaj tu saaz~rasanna ʔnaj iz~ra ka ɮian**ŋshansu nani.
S.FORM: m m m 'nay ni sanuan ni abu tu zana zanaay tu saazasanna 'nay iza ka dianfongshansu nani.
S.PHON: m m m ʔnaj ni sanuan ni aβu tu z~rana z~ranaaj tu saaz~rasanna ʔnaj iz~ra ka ɮian**ŋshansu nani.
S.TRANSL: 阿母交代要帶回去的有你的電風扇.

TRANSL.notes: Mother asked (you) to bring back your fan.

S.TRANSL: Mother asked to bring back your fan.
As well as the water cooler.

S.FORM: m ti isisannumipa u how zinaq ni aimupa misisay hata haw.
S.PHON: m ti isisannumipa u h*w z~rinaq ni aimupa misisaj hata haw.
S.FORM: m ti isisannumipa u how zinaq ni aimupa misisay hata haw.
S.PHON: m ti isisannumipa u h*w z~rinaq ni aimupa misisaj hata haw.

TRANSL.notes: 你們來提還是怎麼樣,(飲水機)很重呢,你們來提好了.

S.TRANSL: 你們來提還是怎麼樣, 很重呢,你們來提好了.

TRANSL.notes: You carry (the water cooler) or whatever. It's heavy. You carry it.

S.TRANSL: You carry or whatever. It's heavy. You carry it.

TRANSL.notes: If there is (one then).
(I will) put (it) at home (first);

S.FORM: aimupati mazasay patanan si awka zinku zinaq qaya qamu isisisanku zinku ya.
S.PHON: aimupati maz~rasaj patanan si awka z~rinku z~rinaq qaja qamu isisisanku z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: aimupati mazasay patanan si awka zinku zinaq qaya qamu isisisanku zinku ya.
S.PHON: aimupati maz~rasaj patanan si awka z~rinku z~rinaq qaja qamu isisisanku z~rinku ja.
S.TRANSL: 你們再帶回去才好.很重耶,我怎麼可能提來提去?

TRANSL.notes: Then you bring it back. (It's) heavy; how can I carry it around?

S.TRANSL: Then you bring it back. heavy; how can I carry it around?

S.FORM: m uzusa inengat ma 'nay wama 'nay inshuiji inshuiji 'nay zinaq.
S.PHON: m uz~rusa inəŋat ma ʔnaj wama ʔnaj inshuiji inshuiji ʔnaj z~rinaq.
S.FORM: m uzusa inengat ma 'nay wama 'nay inshuiji inshuiji 'nay zinaq.
S.PHON: m uz~rusa inəŋat ma ʔnaj wama ʔnaj inshuiji inshuiji ʔnaj z~rinaq.

TRANSL.notes: 這兩個只有那個(電風扇)比較輕,飲水機很重.

S.TRANSL: 這兩個只有那個 比較輕,飲水機很重.

TRANSL.notes: Between the two, only (the fan) is lighter; the water cooler is heavy.

S.TRANSL: Between the two, only is lighter; the water cooler is heavy.
The water cooler is relatively heavier.

S.FORM: en m alakapama tu nyunay ni abu zinku ti meifang qaya nani.
S.PHON: ən m arakapama tu njunaj ni aβu z~rinku ti məi*aŋ qaja nani.
S.FORM: en m alakapama tu nyunay ni abu zinku ti meifang qaya nani.
S.PHON: ən m arakapama tu njunaj ni aβu z~rinku ti məi*aŋ qaja nani.

TRANSL.notes: 我還叫美芳去拿(/買)阿母的牛奶.

S.TRANSL: 我還叫美芳去拿 阿母的牛奶.
I also told Meifang to buy the milk Mother wanted.

S.FORM: palingwaanku nani mana mai tu melaycyapay tu lingwaku ka zinku.
S.PHON: pariŋwaanku nani mana mai tu mərajʦjapaj tu riŋwaku ka z~rinku.
S.FORM: palingwaanku nani mana mai tu melaycyapay tu lingwaku ka zinku.
S.PHON: pariŋwaanku nani mana mai tu mərajʦjapaj tu riŋwaku ka z~rinku.

TRANSL.notes: 我打電話(給媽媽),怎麼沒有人接我的電話.

S.TRANSL: 我打電話 ,怎麼沒有人接我的電話.
I called Mother; how come nobody answered my phone?

TRANSL.notes: 要(他)去那個….

S.FORM: palingwaika ti meifang si malapa tu nyunay ni abu zinku ti tiabinL2 nani.
S.PHON: pariŋwaika ti məi*aŋ si marapa tu njunaj ni aβu z~rinku ti tiaβinr* nani.
S.FORM: palingwaika ti meifang si malapa tu nyunay ni abu zinku ti tiabinL2 nani.
S.PHON: pariŋwaika ti məi*aŋ si marapa tu njunaj ni aβu z~rinku ti tiaβinr* nani.

TRANSL.notes: 我叫阿明打電話給美芳叫她買媽媽的牛奶(奶粉).

S.TRANSL: 我叫阿明打電話給美芳叫她買媽媽的牛奶 .
I told Abin to call Meifang and to ask her to buy the milk Mother wanted.

S.FORM: kwa ya zinna ni abin nani.
S.PHON: kwa ja z~rinna ni aβin nani.
S.FORM: kwa ya zinna ni abin nani.
S.PHON: kwa ja z~rinna ni aβin nani.

S.FORM: sanhao aiku tanan qaya zinna ni abin.
S.PHON: sanha* aiku tanan qaja z~rinna ni aβin.
S.FORM: sanhao aiku tanan qaya zinna ni abin.
S.PHON: sanha* aiku tanan qaja z~rinna ni aβin.
S.TRANSL: 阿明說:「我也是三號回去.」

TRANSL.notes: Abin said, "I will also go back on (June) 3."

S.TRANSL: Abin said, "I will also go back on 3."

TRANSL.notes: (他)也要回去嗎?
(He) will also go back?
He said (he) would also go back.

S.TRANSL: He said would also go back.

S.FORM: azu yau 'nay kelawkawayanna naRin manan zinku.
S.PHON: az~ru jau ʔnaj kərawkawajanna naʁin manan z~rinku.
S.FORM: azu yau 'nay kelawkawayanna naRin manan zinku.
S.PHON: az~ru jau ʔnaj kərawkawajanna naʁin manan z~rinku.

TRANSL.notes: 如果他有工作的話,我想(阿明)不要回去(比較好).

S.TRANSL: 如果他有工作的話,我想 不要回去 .

TRANSL.notes: If he has work, I think (it would be better for him) not to go back.

S.TRANSL: If he has work, I think not to go back.

TRANSL.notes: He said, "I've already taken (several days') leave."

S.FORM: m si nayau mniz mananita n nengiti.
S.PHON: m si najau mniz~r mananita n nəŋiti.
S.FORM: m si nayau mniz mananita n nengiti.
S.PHON: m si najau mniz~r mananita n nəŋiti.
S.TRANSL: 那樣的話,我們全部都回去也好啦.
If so, it would be better that all of us went back.

S.FORM: ni tmanan nengiti paqsiqaz qaya tu.
S.PHON: ni tmanan nəŋiti paqsiqaz~r qaja tu.
S.FORM: ni tmanan nengiti paqsiqaz qaya tu.
S.PHON: ni tmanan nəŋiti paqsiqaz~r qaja tu.
S.TRANSL: 回去也好,不然不好意思.

TRANSL.notes: It would be good (for all of us) to go back; otherwise we would feel sorry.

S.TRANSL: It would be good to go back; otherwise we would feel sorry.

TRANSL.notes: (After all,) (he) is not somebody else.

S.FORM: m 'nay tama na swanita qaya ni kincyang si.
S.PHON: m ʔnaj tama na swanita qaja ni kinʦjaŋ si.
S.FORM: m 'nay tama na swanita qaya ni kincyang si.
S.PHON: m ʔnaj tama na swanita qaja ni kinʦjaŋ si.

TRANSL.notes: (He is) our cousin Kincyang's father-in-law.
